identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a futuristic, immersive dream programming machine that feels like a portal to 2050, not a SaaS landing page.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Tight tracking (-0.02em). aggressive visual impact.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI labels, and data displays. Tech-native feel.

mono.usage: Use for coordinates, code snippets, and tiny decorative labels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#ccff00] text-black hover:bg-[#b3e600] font-bold tracking-tight shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(204,255,0,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#00f0ff] hover:text-[#00f0ff] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)] backdrop-blur-sm

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.holographic: bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-transparent border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-gradient-to-t after:from-[#00f0ff]/5 after:to-transparent after:opacity-0 hover:after:opacity-100 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-[#00f0ff] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00f0ff] text-white placeholder:text-white/30 backdrop-blur-md h-12

hero_bg.description: Abstract purple and blue neural network/nebula background for Hero section

campus_night.description: Futuristic building at night for Campus Tour section preview

future_concept.description: Abstract digital dots/matrix for the Future Simulator background

vr_experience.description: Person with neon lighting, representing the immersive VR experience

strategy.landing: Floating geometric particles or 'Dream Orbs' that react to mouse movement.
strategy.tour: Low-poly 3D map of the campus (placeholder box geometry if model unavailable) with glowing navigation markers.
strategy.simulator: Warp speed tunnel effect during the 'Processing' phase of the story generation.

universal_guidelines: Always use Dark Mode as default. Light mode is forbidden for this futuristic theme.
Do not use generic gradients. Use deep, rich backgrounds with subtle noise.
Typography MUST be Syne for headings and Space Grotesk for body.
Primary CTA color is Acid Lime (#ccff00). Use it sparingly for maximum impact.
All containers must have 'glass' properties: backdrop-blur and semi-transparent borders.
Use 'framer-motion' for all entrance animations. Stagger children.
Ensure 3D canvas has 'pointer-events-none' if it is a background, or specific controls if interactive.
Add a global noise texture overlay to the entire body for filmic quality.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a portal to the future. Every interaction should feel 'cyber'. Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and simulation visuals. Implement the 3D tour using simple geometries if actual models are missing, but style them with wireframe materials to look technical. The Simulator Wizard should feel like a game character creation screen.
